summary: 0.6.67 is a tiny follow-up to the 0.6.66 right-stick volume seam: invert the vertical direction and stop latching a clamped no-op edge bump.
operatorSignals: 0.6.66 volume bumps worked, but the live direction felt inverted.
The seam could also feel stuck after an edge push because the same-direction latch armed on a no-op clamp.
actionsTaken: Flipped the desired vertical volume-bump direction in the existing CUA helper.
Kept the one-bump-per-excursion model but stopped arming the latch when the target volume is already clamped at the edge.
Left all horizontal transport, slideshow, sync, and default-preset seams untouched.
nonGoals: No default-preset autoload fix in this slice.
No movie transport, image slideshow, sync, or plugin UI changes.
